hooks.command: bash -c 'export NVM_DIR="${HOME}/.nvm"; source "${NVM_DIR}/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null; cd /home/bahm/Projects/spaced-learning && OUTPUT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ -z "$OUTPUT" ]; then echo "tsc: OK"; else echo "tsc errors:"; echo "$OUTPUT" | head -20; fi; exit 0'
notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Claude Code needs your attention'
